name: Brain MRI Stroke Protocol
description: Comprehensive brain MRI stroke protocol including DWI, PWI, and MRA

findings.technique: MRI brain performed including DWI, perfusion-weighted imaging, and MR angiography.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Diffusion-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: No areas of restricted diffusion to suggest acute infarction. No acute territorial or lacunar infarcts.

sections.name: Perfusion-Weighted Imaging
sections.content: No perfusion defects identified. Normal cerebral blood flow and volume.

sections.name: MR Angiography - Intracranial
sections.content: Intracranial arteries show [normal caliber / no stenosis / no occlusion]. Circle of Willis is intact.

sections.name: MR Angiography - Extracranial
sections.content: Extracranial carotid and vertebral arteries show [no significant stenosis / no occlusion / normal flow].

impression:
1. No acute infarction on DWI.
2. Normal perfusion study.
3. No large vessel occlusion on MRA.
